rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF IN RE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AGREEMENT OF CHARLES ACTIS/CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-05-287457
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Answers To Intter.,Production Of Documents And For Attorney Fees, Costs And Sanctions.
rulings.Rulings: (1) Respondent's Motion To Compel Identification and Production of Documents is granted as it seeks a log identifying with particularity any documents withheld pursuant to privilege and setting forth the specific ground for the claim of privilege. The log shall be served within 10 days of notice of this order. All requests for sanctions are denied.=(612/HEWLETT)

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF IN RE REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST AGREEMENT OF CHARLES ACTIS/CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE NO. PES-05-287457
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order To Compel Identification & Production Of Documents; For Attorney'S Fees, Costs & Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: (2) Respondent's Motion To Compel Further Answers To Interrogatories and Production of Documents is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as it seeks a further response to No. 29, limited to later acquired information bearing upon all answers previously made in response to interrogatories. Those responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. No. 29 is not proper as it asks for later acquired information bearing upon responses to any other discovery. All requests for sanctions are denied. = (612/HEWLETT)
